title: Senior Doctor - Jaypee Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Jaypee Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!
